calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Award
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Asha Davis, in pro per, Tel. 415.881.0093, for plaintiffs;
Nicole S. Hannington, of Law Offices of McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher LLP, Tel. 925.939.5330, for defendants.

Ruling: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ASHA DAVIS' Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award is denied. Ms. Davis failed to establish any of the limited grounds to vacate or correct an arbitration award. There is no evidence that Ms. Davis requested and was refused a continuance so that the results of the pending investigation of the Medical Board were available for the arbitration. The arbitrator's award based on the finding that Ms. Davis failed to produce a declaration from an equally qualified expert identifying a breach of the standard of care or causation did not exceed the arbitrator's authority. Language used by respondents in their briefs is not a ground to vacate the arbitration award because it does not show any misconduct by the arbitrator. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600; Dept. 302.
